title: The Lost Realms
description: 1.21.1 │ Explore a dangerous yet magical world!
body:
!["The Lost Realms" in Minecraft title font with purple gradient.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fbe8e079aa1a3cd026c3a4c0dd072e990b96960.png)

# Experience a New World

### An Overhauled Overworld

Explore a new and vibrant overworld thanks to mods such as [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) and [Luki's Grand Capitals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-grand-capitals), alongside an assortment of structure mods to provide plenty of opportunity for adventure.

![The new overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/e2aed112d994b99278ec7981e061d1b88e7a3599.png)

### New and Overhauled Dimensions

Delve into dark new realms such as the [Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden) and the [Otherside](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker), and an all new End with [Stellarity](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity).

![The Undergarden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/e874cbef7267f2fe9f05f813ec427b251d7576d2.png)

### Make New Friends

With [Re:Animal](https://modrinth.com/mod/re-animal) and [Critters and Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) there's a wide variety of new animals to meet and tame, and with [Dragon Mounts Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/dmr) you can hatch and ride your very own dragons.

![An otter from Critters and Companions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/e9f1a16c4adc77fe8828ca0ae3adb94556a9f261.png)

# Fight and Survive

### New Combat

Wield powerful new weapons in an all new way thanks to [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), or unleash powerful magic with [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks).

![Fighting a skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/e1b40a92aa649ae3a1328cf0e5c8f5087698f741.png)

### New Enemies of All Kinds

Not only are there a multitude of new and terrifying monsters to fight from [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos), but with [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat/versions) the temperature may be your greatest threat as [seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) change.

![A Fallen Chaos Warrior](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/52cc035ba4bf0490fe767f6c737faf574fa9c7e6.png)

### Food and Hunger

With [Spice of Life: Valheim Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-valheim-reforged) food is now more important than ever, but thanks to [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and various addons you've never had more culinary options.

![Crops from Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/4685299cad98c4030a96b4664627dcaf84c1a6c3.png)

# Build and Create

### Magic and Machinery

Utilize dark magic and pratice wichcreaft with [Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum), or make mechanical contraptions and even automate your spellmaking with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Create Wizardry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-wizardry).

![Malum spirit infusion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/24027d4496064a079ed2739347addc4af6003bf3.png)

### Decorate

With a variety of decor mods such as [Unusual Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/unusual-furniture), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), and [Beautify](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify) among others—you can decorate your builds to your hearts content.

![A table and chairs outdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E6FzErXG/images/bff2cbe3d1fc1b040512f1d60c5b59c38a7c1d31.png)

# Misc

### Performance

Thanks to a variety of performance optimization and fine-tuning, the pack performs well even with a more modest setup. The game runs between 50-60 fps on a laptop with a Nvidia RTX 3050 GPU, an Intel i7 CPU, and 16 gbs of RAM—with Distant Horizons set to medium and Complementary Reimagined Shaders set to high.

It is recommended that you add the follwoing to the custom java arguements of your installation, and give Minecraft _at least_ 8 gbs of RAM.
```
-XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational
```

### Planned

- Better intergration of Simply Swords
- Guide/Progression book

### Issues

You can report any issues you find with the modpack and get help on [The Lost Realms Discord](https://discord.gg/WR5dPkzGbu).
